name: Osama Asghar
description: I am a Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience specializing in the MERN/SERN stack (Node.js, Express.js, React.js, Next.js, and SQL/NoSQL databases). I have strong expertise in building scalable backend systems, secure REST APIs, role-based access control (RBAC), and real-time applications. My experience spans healthcare, ERP, and enterprise platforms, where I focus on delivering high-performance, secure, and maintainable solutions. I also build responsive and user-friendly interfaces using React.js and modern UI libraries, ensuring seamless end-to-end product delivery.
